data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,900 USDT with a 2.10% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 25, 2026, 16:16 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,900 USDT and is now trading at 2,895.399902 USDT, with a narrowed 2.10% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Microsoft's AI Data Centers Enhance Azure Growth and Boost Stock Sentiment
data.description: Microsoft's introduction of Fairwater AI data centers has significantly bolstered the growth of its Azure platform, positively impacting MSFT stock sentiment. According to NS3.AI, analysts from Morgan Stanley and UBS have identified a strong upside potential for Microsoft, driven by the increasing adoption of enterprise AI. They have set price targets for the company's stock between $600 and $650. While there is some caution regarding a potential AI bubble, Microsoft is widely regarded as a major beneficiary of AI expansion through 2026.

data.title: Ultra-Wealthy Leverage DeFi for Bitcoin-Backed Loans
data.description: Jerome de Tychey, founder of Cometh, is leveraging decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms to facilitate borrowing for ultra-wealthy individuals using their substantial Bitcoin holdings. According to NS3.AI, platforms such as Aave, Morpho, and Uniswap are being utilized to provide liquidity without the need to sell off assets. These loans are frequently used to fund luxury expenses, including yacht enhancements and travel to destinations like Cannes.

data.title: BREAKING: A Cryptocurrency Scandal Could Erupt in the US – Allegedly, the Father of a Cryptocurrency Thief is Managing the US’s Cryptocurrencies
data.description:
According to crypto detective ZachXBT, John Daghita, who is accused of stealing over $40 million worth of cryptocurrency from the US government, is the son of the CEO of CMDSS, the company contracted by the US government to manage seized cryptocurrencies. Following ZachXBT’s statements, CMDSS’s official website and social media accounts were shut down. According […] Continue Reading: BREAKING: A Cryptocurrency Scandal Could Erupt in the US – Allegedly, the Father of a Cryptocurrency Thief is Managing the US’s Cryptocurrencies

data.title: Crypto Market Sees $130 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
data.description: In the past 24 hours, the cryptocurrency market experienced liquidations totaling $130 million. According to Odaily, Bitcoin accounted for $30.75 million of these liquidations. Additionally, long positions saw liquidations amounting to $91.31 million, while short positions faced $38.85 million in liquidations.

data.title: ZachXBT: Suspect in $40 million Crypto Asset Theft Case Involving the US Government May Be Son of CMDSS CEO
data.description: On the X platform, “Chain detective” ZachXBT revealed that John Daghita, who stole more than $40 million in cryptocurrency from the US government, is the son of the CEO of CMDSS, a company that had been contracted by the US government to handle seized cryptocurrency.

data.title: In the past 24 hours, a total of $130 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network, with $30.75 million in BTC liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $130 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past 24 hours, with $30.75 million in BTC liquidations. In addition, $91.31 million in long positions were liquidated and $38.85 million in short positions were liquidated.

The most noticeable change affects Gboard, Google’s keyboard application for Android phones. Users who press the apostrophe key […]

data.title: ETHZilla Trades Ethereum for Jet Engines in RWA Tokenization Push
data.description:
The Ethereum-focused treasury firm ETHZilla has taken a sharp turn in strategy, acquiring two commercial jet engines for $12. 2 million in January 2026 as it pivots toward real-world asset (RWA) tokenization. The move marks a departure from a crypto-heavy balance sheet and signals a shift toward revenue-generating industrial assets
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethzilla-trades-ethereum-for-jet-engines-in-rwa-tokenization-push/

data.title: Pantera General Partner: People overestimate Wall Street’s readiness for quantum era
data.description:

data.title: Crypto ETFs with Staking Features Offer Yield Potential but Pose Risks
data.description: Crypto exchange-traded funds (ETFs) that incorporate staking features present an opportunity for investors to enhance their yield potential. According to NS3.AI, while these financial products can offer attractive returns, they also introduce additional custody risks that may not be suitable for every investor profile. The article provides a comparison between direct investments in Ethereum and staking funds, aiming to assist investors in aligning their choices with their financial objectives.
